name: stz-foundry
description: STZ Foundry: the evolution of slice-tournament-zoo into a standalone BYO-LLM foundry — a contract-bounded slice pipeline that implements each slice adversarially via an N-specimen tournament with frozen sealed tests, GRPO-style selection, layered anti-reward-hacking, a replayable markdown audit trail, and a provider-agnostic runner (Anthropic/OpenAI-compatible HTTP, local Ollama/vLLM) that owns the spawn-and-collect loop.
